title: T-021 — UI: Work Request + MWO List + Create/Triage modals (MNT-017..020, MNT-M-03)
prompt:
# T-021 — WR/MWO list pages + create/triage modals

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.3 MNT-017..020, §10.4 MNT-M-03
UX: prototypes/design/13-MAINTENANCE-UX.md:302-434
Prototypes: work-orders.jsx:1-259 (wr_list_page, mwo_list_page); modals.jsx:81-234 (wr_create_modal, wr_triage_modal, mwo_create_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Routes `/maintenance/wr` (table/kanban toggle, requested-state MWOs) and `/maintenance/mwos` (tabs My/Open/InProgress/Overdue/Completed). WR Create modal (shop-floor optimized, optional auto-fill from downtime), WR Triage modal (approve/reject/duplicate paths), MWO Create modal (manager).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/wr/page.tsx` — RSC; URL `?view=table|kanban`; tab counts via parallel COUNT queries.
2. `apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/page.tsx` — RSC; tab badges via parallel queries; filters via nuqs URL params for type/priority/technician/source.
3. WR Create modal: 3-field shop-floor form + photo upload (max 5×10MB) + auto-fill via `?downtimeEventId` param. Calls `requestMwo` Server Action (T-010) writing state='requested', source='manual_request' or 'auto_downtime'.
4. WR Triage modal: 3-path RadioGroup (approve/reject/duplicate); approve subform (priority+type+technician+startDate); reject reason ≥10 chars; duplicate Command search. Calls `approveMwo`/`rejectMwo`/`markMwoDuplicate` Server Actions. V-MNT-02 client-side advisory (server enforces).
5. MWO Create modal: full 5-type RadioGroup + priority RadioGroup + asset Select + sanitation allergen Checkbox conditional. Manager RBAC. Calls assignMwo Server Action.
6. RBAC: WR submit (all auth roles), Triage button (manager only), MWO create button (manager only) — server-side.
7. Empty/loading/error/permission states + i18n keys per T-013.

## Prototype parity
- WR list table+kanban toggle — RTL snapshot work-orders.jsx:1-132.
- MWO list 6 tabs + filter bar + DT impact column + inline actions — snapshot work-orders.jsx:134-259.
- WR create modal severity ToggleGroup + photo upload + QR scan button P2 stub — snapshot modals.jsx:81-121.
- WR triage 3-path RadioGroup — snapshot modals.jsx:123-183.
- MWO create RadioGroup grids — snapshot modals.jsx:185-234.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/wr/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_components/wr-create-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_components/wr-triage-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_components/mwo-create-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/wr/__tests__/wr-list.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/mwos/__tests__/mwo-list.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_components/__tests__/modals.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given /maintenance/wr renders, when compared to work-orders.jsx:1-132, then table+kanban toggle + filter bar + Triage RBAC-gated match.
2. Given /maintenance/mwos renders, when compared to work-orders.jsx:134-259, then 6 tabs + filter bar + DT impact column + inline state-driven actions match.
3. Given WR create submitted with allergen flag=true, when settled, then requestMwo is called and outbox mwo.requested row written.
4. Given WR triage submitted as approve with approver===requester, when client form mounts the advisory alert appears AND on server submit fails MWO_APPROVER_SAME_AS_REQUESTER (T-010 V-MNT-02).
5. Given operator session, when /maintenance/mwos renders, then "New MWO" + "Triage" buttons hidden server-side.
6. Given closeout, when reviewers inspect, then Playwright trace + screenshots attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity tests for list pages + 3 modals. Playwright e2e for WR create + triage flow.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/{wr,mwos,_components}`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not introduce a separate `work_requests` table — WR is MWO in state='requested' per D-MNT-9.
- Do not implement DnD kanban — prototype is click-to-triage P1 (D-MNT-9 + BL-MAINT-DnD).
- Do not bypass RBAC server-side.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not skip outbox emission — downstream dashboards depend on mwo.* events.
